title: How to remove the first N characters from a cell
task: Strip a fixed number of characters off the front of a text string (e.g. a prefix).
keywords: delete first n characters google sheets

excel.note: Keep everything except the first 3 characters.

explanation: LEN(A2) is the total length; subtracting 3 leaves the count after the first three characters, and RIGHT returns that many from the end. 'SKU12345' becomes '12345'. Change 3 to remove a different number of leading characters.
